# Codeck

> Self-hosted Claude Code sandbox with persistent memory, agent teams, and 116+ pre-configured skills. Always on. Access from any device.

## Docs

- [Documentation](https://docs.codeck.xyz)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/cyphercr0w/codeck)
- [Install (Linux/macOS)](https://codeck.xyz/install)
- [Install (Windows)](https://codeck.xyz/install.ps1)

## What is Codeck?

Codeck is a persistent cloud sandbox for Claude Code. It gives developers an always-on AI coding environment with:

- Persistent memory that survives across sessions
- 66+ specialized sub-agents for different tasks
- 116+ pre-configured skills (security, testing, architecture, etc.)
- 59+ slash commands
- Agent teams for parallel multi-agent work
- Live preview panel with HMR
- Token optimization (60-90% savings)
- One-click OAuth integrations (GitHub, Supabase, Vercel, etc.)
- Scheduled agents (cron-based autonomous tasks)
- Access from any device via web terminal

## Installation

Linux/macOS:
curl -fsSL https://codeck.xyz/install | bash

Windows (PowerShell):
irm codeck.xyz/install.ps1 | iex

## Optional

- [Codeck Cloud Waitlist](https://codeck.xyz) — Managed hosted version coming soon
